specFidelityNotes: Diff c1c4af7c..a35e542b (#468). live_partition.py implements LIVE bucket E2E: skip completed (shop_id,live,date), CallBudgetGovernor soft/hard cap, A-29 overview then A-28 session list, shop rollup with live_hours (clipped session durations), live_sessions, views→visitors, product_impressions→impressions, A-29 GMV/orders/rates, optional per-session upserts via expand_analytics_live_session, mark_complete only after upserts. Forbidden A-26/A-27 guarded by allowlist + regex. Additive A-29 in production-read allowlist. mapping.py untouched. Seven fixture unit tests cover all ACs.

convention_notes.note: run_live_partition documented in Public API with skip/budget/complete contract.
